summary: Iteration 49: Verified firm subscription plans on landing page + Cyrillic PDF support + 360° removal - ALL TESTS PASS
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/ai-designer/photo-pdf - Cyrillic text handling works (FreeSans font registered)
✅ Landing page (/) - NO 360° text found on entire page
✅ БАЗОВ plan card found (15 EUR/мес) - data-testid='firm-plan-базов'
✅ ПРО plan card found (35 EUR/мес) - data-testid='firm-plan-про'
✅ PREMIUM plan card found (75 EUR/мес) - data-testid='firm-plan-premium'
✅ '90% ИЗБИРАТ ТОЗИ!' badge visible on ПРО plan
✅ Notification explanation box shows PREMIUM→ПРО→БАЗОВ priority
✅ v8.0 badge visible on 3D Designer page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified: 1) Firm subscription plans on landing page - БАЗОВ (15 EUR), ПРО (35 EUR), PREMIUM (75 EUR) with Избери buttons. 2) PDF endpoint uses FreeSans font for Cyrillic support. 3) No 360° text anywhere on site (landing page and /room-scan). Notification explanation box shows priority order: PREMIUM gets notifications first (10:00), ПРО after 10 min, БАЗОВ manual search only. All data-testids work correctly: firm-subscriptions-section, firm-plan-базов, firm-plan-про, firm-plan-premium, firm-plan-btn-базов, firm-plan-btn-про, firm-plan-btn-premium.

firm_subscriptions_section.details: Section visible on landing page with data-testid='firm-subscriptions-section'

basov_plan_15eur.details: БАЗОВ plan card with 15 EUR price and Избери button visible

pro_plan_35eur.details: ПРО plan card with 35 EUR price, '90% ИЗБИРАТ ТОЗИ!' badge, and Избери button visible

premium_plan_75eur.details: PREMIUM plan card with 75 EUR price, 'КРАЛСКИ!' badge, and Избери button visible

notification_priority_box.details: Explanation box shows PREMIUM→ПРО→БАЗОВ priority order (10:00, +10 мин, ръчно)

pdf_cyrillic_support.details: POST /api/ai-designer/photo-pdf uses FreeSans font, returns valid PDF with Cyrillic

pdf_budget_table_columns.details: PDF contains Bulgarian column headers: Материал, Количество, Цена EUR, Магазин, Линк

no_360_landing_page.details: Landing page contains no '360' text - uses '3D' instead

no_360_reviews_api.details: GET /api/reviews returns reviews with no '360' text

v8_badge.details: v8.0 badge visible on 3D Designer page header
